wafregional.webacl.DefaultAction.Docs: The action to perform if none of the `Rules` contained in the `WebACL` match. The action is specified by the `WafAction` object.

wafregional.webacl.MetricName.Docs: A name for the metrics for this `WebACL`. The name can contain only alphanumeric characters (A-Z, a-z, 0-9), with maximum length 128 and minimum length one. It can't contain whitespace or metric names reserved for AWS WAF, including "All" and "Default_Action." You can't change `MetricName` after you create the `WebACL`.

wafregional.webacl.Name.Docs: A friendly name or description of the `WebACL`. You can't change the name of a `WebACL` after you create it.

wafregional.webacl.Rules.Docs: An array that contains the action for each `Rule` in a `WebACL`, the priority of the `Rule`, and the ID of the `Rule`.
